message:
feat(core): add input-to-paint QoE guardrail lane with SLO evaluation (ft-2p9cb.6.5.1)

QoEMetric (InputToPaint/FrameJitter/Smoothness/KeystrokeEcho), QoESLO,
QoEMeasurement, QoEGuardrailConfig with 4 default SLOs, SLOVerdict
(Met/Breached/InsufficientData), QoEGuardrailSnapshot, QoEDegradation,
QoELogEntry, QoEGuardrail with record, evaluate_slo/all, window eviction,
percentile computation, smoothness polarity, snapshot, detect_degradation,
log_entry, reset. 26 unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
